figures.caption: Fig. 1. FM-fMRI overview. (A) Inputs and encoders: resting-state ROI time series are encoded to parameterize a structured prior, while event information is encoded into event tokens; (B) Training: we learn an event-conditioned velocity field via crossattention, optimized with flow-matching, connectivity and spectrum-aware objectives. (C) Inference: task time series trajectories are synthesized by integrating the learned ODE.
Table 1. Subject-level generation performance grouped by metric. Best values are bolded.
Fig. 2. Group-level FC comparison on all HCP tasks.
Table 3. Ablation results on Event information and Aux losses. Best values are bolded.
